failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'italian & (pancetta | prosciutto)')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'italian & (pancetta | prosciutto)')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'italian | restaurant')
  AND p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'pancetta | prosciutto')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'italian | restaurant | pancetta | prosciutto')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
